from openpyxl import Workbook
wb = Workbook()
wb.active.title = "Datos"
wb.create_sheet("Salida")
print(wb.sheetnames)

from openpyxl import Workbook

ws["A3"] = "=A1+A2"

exercises.justification_from_packet: Formulas stored as strings starting with =.

exercises.code:
from openpyxl import Workbook
ws = Workbook().active
ws["A1"], ws["A2"] = 3, 4
print(ws["A1"].value + ws["A2"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font
ws = Workbook().active
ws["A1"].font = Font(bold=True)
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import PatternFill
ws = Workbook().active
ws["A1"].fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
print(ws["A1"].fill is not None)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

def header_style(ws, cell):
    ws[cell].font = Font(bold=True)
    ws[cell].fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")
ws = Workbook().active
header_style(ws, "A1")
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

from openpyxl import Workbook
from datetime import date
ws = Workbook().active
ws["A1"] = date(2024, 1, 15)
print(ws["A1"].value.isoformat())

from openpyxl import Workbook
ws = Workbook().active
ws.merge_cells("B1:C1")
ws["B1"] = "x"
print(ws["C1"].value)

from openpyxl import Workbook
ws = Workbook().active
ws.merge_cells("A1:B1")
ws.merge_cells("C1:D1")
print(len(ws.merged_cells.ranges))

import pandas as pd
det = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["Lima", "Lima", "Cusco"], "monto": [10.0, 5.0, 7.0]})
print(det.groupby("region")["monto"].sum().to_dict())

def reconcile(det_sum, portada, tol=0.01):
    return abs(det_sum - portada) < tol
print(reconcile(22.0, 22.005))
print(reconcile(22.0, 23.0))
print(["region", "monto"] == ["region", "monto"])
print([r for r in ["Lima", "Piura"] if r not in {"Lima", "Cusco"}])
print(sum(1 for v in ["ok", "corrupt", "ok"] if v == "ok"))

name = "report.lock"
print("locked" if name.endswith(".lock") or "lock" in name else "ok")

from collections import Counter
print(dict(Counter({"a": "ok", "b": "corrupt"}.values())))
print({"backup": "results.prev.xlsx", "idempotent": True})

import hashlib

def build(rows):
    return "\n".join(["region,monto"] + [f"{r},{m}" for r, m in sorted(rows)]) + "\n"
r1 = [("Lima", 10), ("Cusco", 5)]
print(hashlib.sha1(build(r1).encode()).hexdigest() == hashlib.sha1(build(list(reversed(r1))).encode()).hexdigest())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Sorted build → same hash regardless of input order.
